title: AWS CloudWatch metrics namespace should not begin with 'aws'
description: AWS CloudWatch metrics namespace should not start with 'aws' to ensure unique names and better organization.
message: Metrics namespace should not start with 'aws'.
recommendation: Use a custom prefix for your CloudWatch metrics namespace.
why_is_this_an_issue: Starting CloudWatch metrics namespace with 'aws' may cause conflicts and confusion with AWS-provided namespaces.
how_to_fix: Use a custom prefix for your CloudWatch metrics namespace.
